title: Tether-pegged USDT0 stablecoin crosses $100 billion transaction volume milestone
message_html: Tether-pegged USDT0 stablecoin crosses $100 billion transaction volume milestone ...
snippet: USDT0, backed 1:1 by tethers, the largest stablecoin by market capitalization, is the third-largest holder of USDT.

title: Spark migrates $150M in stablecoin to Uniswap to advance shared liquidity
message_html: Spark migrates $150M in stablecoin to Uniswap to advance shared liquidity ...
snippet: Spark deployed approximately $150 million across two Uniswap v4 pools on Ethereum, while its DualPool hook and Shared Liquidity Layer are planned for later phases.

title: SBI to acquire Bitbank in $289M deal creating Japan's biggest crypto exchange
message_html: SBI to acquire Bitbank in $289M deal creating Japan's biggest crypto exchange ...
snippet: The Japanese financial conglomerate plans to take full control of Bitbank as it expands an ecosystem spanning crypto trading, stablecoins, tokenization and blockchain infrastructure.
